name: document_controller_add_iso7200_revision_clouds_to_pdf_at_detected_changes
desc: Embeds ISO 7200 revision cloud annotations onto a PDF at specified change regions. Returns annotated PDF path.

parameters.name: sourcePdfPath
parameters.description: Path to the source PDF to annotate

parameters.name: outputPdfPath
parameters.description: Path for the annotated output PDF

parameters.name: changeRegionIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated change region IDs to annotate (from comparison result)
